level.description: Domain level (i.e. tez has level=1, domain.tez has level=2, subdomain.domain.tez has level=3, etc.).

reverse.description: Whether or not the domain is on the reverse records list

data.description: Arbitrary data bound to the domain.

firstLevel.description:
Level of the block where the domain was first seen.  
**[sortable]**

firstTime.description: Timestamp of the block where the domain was first seen.

lastLevel.description:
Level of the block where the domain was last seen.  
**[sortable]**

lastTime.description: Timestamp of the block where the domain was last seen.
